mapper.sql: select reading_id, node_id, soil_moisture_pct, air_temp_c, air_humidity_pct, light_lux, soil_temp_c, soil_ph, co2_ppm, water_ph, reading_time, create_time from agri_sensor_reading
mapper.select:
and node_id = #{nodeId}
order by reading_time desc

select avg(soil_moisture_pct) as avg_soil_moisture_pct, avg(air_temp_c) as avg_air_temp_c, avg(air_humidity_pct) as avg_air_humidity_pct, avg(light_lux) as avg_light_lux, avg(soil_temp_c) as avg_soil_temp_c, avg(soil_ph) as avg_soil_ph, avg(co2_ppm) as avg_co2_ppm, avg(water_ph) as avg_water_ph from agri_sensor_reading where node_id = #{nodeId} and reading_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{hours} hour)
mapper.insert: insert into agri_sensor_reading ( node_id, soil_moisture_pct, air_temp_c, air_humidity_pct, light_lux, soil_temp_c, soil_ph, co2_ppm, water_ph, reading_time, create_time ) values ( #{nodeId}, #{soilMoisturePct}, #{airTempC}, #{airHumidityPct}, #{lightLux}, #{soilTempC}, #{soilPh}, #{co2Ppm}, #{waterPh}, #{readingTime}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from agri_sensor_reading where reading_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select r.node_id as nodeId, n.node_name as nodeName, count(*) as readingCount from agri_sensor_reading r join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id group by r.node_id, n.node_name order by readingCount desc

select date_format(reading_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateStr, avg(air_temp_c) as avgTemp, avg(air_humidity_pct) as avgHumidity, avg(soil_moisture_pct) as avgMoisture from agri_sensor_reading where node_id = #{nodeId} and reading_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) group by date_format(reading_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by dateStr
